mappings.rationaleAI: Gold discovery near Sacramento triggered massive mining operations including hydraulic mining and mercury-based extraction, directly illustrating surface mining processes (B.1.a), metal ore products (B.1.b), and gold production (C.3.f), while demonstrating the environmental consequences of industrial-scale resource extraction.

Iron smelting technology requiring higher temperatures than bronze, the abundance and wide distribution of iron ore, and the manufacture of harder tools and weapons address metal ore extraction (B.1.b) and the production and processing of iron (C.3.g).

Five thousand years of glass manufacturing from raw materials, Venetian Murano craft traditions, modern float glass production, and fiber optics fabrication directly address the manufacture of conventional and special types of glass and glass products (C.5.a).

Cheap iron and steel manufacturing and coal-powered industrial processes address coal utilization (C.2), iron production (C.3.g), steel manufacturing (C.3.o), and the mining of coal and metal ores as industrial raw materials (B.1.b).
